title: scutellaria agrestis
intro: Scutellaria agrestis, also known as Woodland Skullcap, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family, native to the mountainous regions of China. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which have been utilized for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Woodland Skullcap include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of fever and sore throat. Woodland Skullcap can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its dried roots and leaves are often used in herbal remedies.
